description:
*FRESH GRADUATES ARE WELCOME TO APPLY!
THIS POSITION
REQUIRES CODING SKILL
.
For a non-coding position please refer to the position of Associate QA Engineer (Software Tester)
Job Responsibilities:
Develop, implement, and maintain distributed stress test / load test / performance test scripts written in NodeJS (JavaScript) / Python and HTTP API / WebSockets.
Execute distributed stress tests and compile stress test results for analysis and communicate test results with product managers, development teams, and devops teams.
Develop, implement, and maintain automated testing tools for QA teams based upon specific requirements allowing efficient automated test case execution.
Develop, implement, and maintain small/medium-scale automation projects on an on-demand basis.
Job Requirements:
Preferably software developers with Diploma / Bachelor's Degree / Professional Degree in Computer Science / Information Technology, Engineering, or equivalent.
Proficiency in NodeJS (JavaScript) and Python3 is required.
Knowledge of ReactJS & MongoDB along with HTTP API and WebSockets is advantageous.
Experience with
PlayWright
&
Appium
automation tools as well as CDP & ADB is a plus.
Candidates should possess exceptional analytical skills, coupled with an unyielding attention to detail and a penchant for troubleshooting complex issues.
Candidates should possess a strong understanding of software development life cycle, testing methodologies, and agile practices.
Candidates should possess exceptional communication skills, both written and verbal, facilitating seamless collaboration with team members and stakeholders.
Candidates should be highly organized and self-driven, with the ability to manage multiple tasks concurrently.
Candidates should possess a proactive attitude towards learning and adopting new technologies.
Proven track record with automated QA / software automation or similar skills, with a background in stress testing would be advantageous.
Preferably developers with working experience. However,
fresh graduates who possess equivalent skillsets are encouraged to apply.
Candidates with
EQUIVALENT technical skills are ENCOURAGED to apply.
Required Language(s): English, Mandarin (Candidate needs to liaise with Mandarin-speaking counterparts).
How this career will benefit you:
This is a permanent role.
Benefits of this role:
13th Months Salary (upon Company Declaration)
Project Incentive (upon Company Declaration based on project performance)
Fixed Allowance (upon Confirmation)
